chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-103 0{ 2024 Date OrUer with gnat٧r٥٢ ٤ J٧٥g٤ For hearing of main case 21.03.2024 Mr. Aijaz A Pannu Advocate for the Petitioner Mr, Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG nH44n٣4 + ٦ ٠ ٣ ٠ + ٣ ٣ ٣ Mr, Ziaul Haque Kamboh advocate has filed power on behalf of Respondent No 5 along with schedule of payment which is taken on recoro, 3٨٥ submits that outstanding amount commutation, gratuity and LPR would be to the petitioner as per such schedule Counsel for the petitioner satisfied 3٨0 this petition accordingly disposed of in terms of schedule of payment submitted by Counsel for Respondent No5 However default or nonpayment of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedings - pald
